name: HMS Stella Rigel (FY 657)
events: 25 Sep 1943 The British MS Trawler HMS Donna Nook was sunk of Harwich after a collision with the British MS Trawler HMS Stella Rigel.

27 Jun 1944 Damaged by aerially delivered mine of coast of Normandy. (source: Report by the Allied Naval Commander in Chief, Expeditionary Force, on Neptune, Volume II, Part II, Defence of the British Assault Area, Section V, Casualties Subsequent to the Assault, p. 23) (1)
